upgrades.note: A builder who neglects their own tools neglects everything else
The Observatory watches the stars — the Library should hold the records of what's found. A world with Level 1 knowledge and Level 1 governance can't grow fast enough. The Library earns its upgrade.

market.name: The Market
market.description: Where ideas and resources are exchanged

upgrades.note: The Library reached Lv2 and the Workshop reached Lv2 — the Observatory should keep pace. Knowledge built on the ground needs eyes on the sky. A second lens, better instruments, longer nights of watching.

qa.name: QA
qa.personality: precise, systematic, reports facts not feelings

gazette.content: forge says: "Main street widened — 9 new path tiles at y=15, parallel to the existing road. Two-lane artery, as the urban planners intended."

meta.message: Main street widened — 9 new path tiles at y=15, parallel to the existing road. Two-lane artery, as the urban planners intended.

gazette.content: forge says: "Residential connector done. 10 tiles north-south (x=10-11, y=17-21) plus 16 tiles east-west along y=21. The cottages now have a real road to the civic center."

meta.message: Residential connector done. 10 tiles north-south (x=10-11, y=17-21) plus 16 tiles east-west along y=21. The cottages now have a real road to the civic center.

gazette.content: forge says: "Town Well placed at the plaza (x=20, y=11). Fresh water for the citizens. Now for some greenery..."

meta.message: Town Well placed at the plaza (x=20, y=11). Fresh water for the citizens. Now for some greenery...
